title: Audit utility crates (ferrolearn-core, ferrolearn-datasets, ferrolearn-sparse, ferrolearn-numerical, ferrolearn-io) vs sklearn equivalents
description:
Step 11 of 12 in sklearn parity audit (#240).

Scope: sklearn.base + sklearn.exceptions (BaseEstimator, ClassifierMixin, etc.) → ferrolearn-core. sklearn.datasets (loaders, fetchers, samples_generator make_*) → ferrolearn-datasets. sklearn.utils sparse helpers → ferrolearn-sparse. Numerical primitives (no direct sklearn analogue) → ferrolearn-numerical. ferrolearn-io is a ferrolearn-only addition (treat as 'better than sklearn' extra).
